tasks.subject: Canonical Cairn Codex proof
tasks.description: Create /tmp/cairn-codex-proof/proof.txt with content ok, verify it on disk, and return completed JSON with the absolute path in file_changes.

payload.goal: Prove the Cairn package can execute a canonical trusted-VM task on its default adapter.

tasks.subject: Create the Cairn clone-readiness charter
tasks.description: Define Cairn's mission, boundaries, evidence model, and promotion gates as the first sibling agent beside Lumen.

payload.mission: Operate Cairn as the runtime parity and clone-readiness agent for sibling VM rollout.
acceptance_criteria: Defines Cairn's boundaries and intended role
Defines evidence required before promoting a sibling VM
Defines adapter parity checks Cairn is responsible for
Defines when clone-readiness work should escalate to the operator
payload.operator_goal: Create the governing charter for Cairn's first proving phase.

tasks.subject: Produce the first runtime parity baseline for sibling agents
tasks.description: Map what is currently shared versus agent-specific across the proving runtime and identify the minimum contracts required before Arc, Lumen, Forge, and Cairn can move in tighter lock-step.

payload.mission: Create the initial parity baseline for multi-agent runtime rollout.
acceptance_criteria: Lists the next bounded parity tasks
Gives the operator a concrete promotion checklist
payload.operator_goal: Produce the first parity baseline for the sibling-agent rollout.
